tasks.title: Remove includeBuild from samples-java
tasks.description: Once temporal-spring-ai is published to Maven Central, remove the includeBuild('../sdk-java') block from samples-java/settings.gradle and the grpc-util workaround from core/build.gradle.
tasks.notes: Blocked on SDK release. Not actionable yet.

tasks.title: Discuss: temporal-spring-ai-starter artifact for easier onboarding
tasks.description: Create a temporal-spring-ai-starter artifact (POM-only, no code) that transitively pulls in temporal-spring-ai, temporal-sdk, and temporal-spring-boot-starter. Prevents version mismatches and ClassNotFoundException for users starting from scratch.
tasks.notes: DABH review comment: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829/files#r3053808755. Do after merging the main PR — not urgent for initial landing.
